languages.text: Кажущийся бесконечным Патент Вольного Торговца расстилается по всему полу камеры.

traits.locale_text: Кажущийся бесконечным Патент Вольного Торговца расстилается по всему полу камеры.

languages.text: The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.
languages.original_text: Кажущийся бесконечным Патент Вольного Торговца расстилается по всему полу камеры.

traits.locale_text: The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.
The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.
The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.

languages.text: 贸易授状在房间地板上铺开，仿佛一片无尽延伸的羊皮纸。
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.

traits.locale_text: 贸易授状在房间地板上铺开，仿佛一片无尽延伸的羊皮纸。

languages.text: La Patente de Comercio está extendida por el suelo de la cámara, dando la imagen de una extensión infinita de pergamino.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.

traits.locale_text: La Patente de Comercio está extendida por el suelo de la cámara, dando la imagen de una extensión infinita de pergamino.

languages.text: La lettre de marque se déroule sur le sol comme un parchemin qui n'en finit pas.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.

traits.locale_text: La lettre de marque se déroule sur le sol comme un parchemin qui n'en finit pas.

languages.text: Ticari Ruhsatname, odanın zeminine bitmek bilmez bir parşömen denizi gibi yayılmış.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.

traits.locale_text: Ticari Ruhsatname, odanın zeminine bitmek bilmez bir parşömen denizi gibi yayılmış.

languages.text: Der Handelsbrief ist als scheinbar endloses Pergament auf dem Boden der Kammer ausgebreitet.
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.

traits.locale_text: Der Handelsbrief ist als scheinbar endloses Pergament auf dem Boden der Kammer ausgebreitet.

languages.text: 商売の証書は、広大な紙の広がりを思わせるように、議会の床に広がっている。
languages.original_text: The Warrant of Trade spreads out across the floor of the chamber in a seemingly endless expanse of parchment.

traits.locale_text: 商売の証書は、広大な紙の広がりを思わせるように、議会の床に広がっている。
